title: Cynicus To W. Shakespeare
content:
You wrote a line too much, my sage,
        Of seers the first, and first of sayers;
    For only half the world's a stage,
        And only all the women players.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, James Kenneth Stephen delivers a powerful performance in "Cynicus To W. Shakespeare"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
